title: paeonia corallina f. broteri
intro: Paeonia corallina f. broteri is a type of flowering plant, specifically a cultivar of the Paeonia corallina species, which is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating pain, inflammation, and anxiety, due to its high content of glycosides and alkaloids. The health benefits of Paeonia corallina f. broteri include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes and improve sleep quality. Paeonia corallina f. broteri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
